name: SigNoz
description: Open-source observability platform with metrics, traces, and logs. Monitor infrastructure alerting.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your SigNoz instance
2. Go to Settings → API Keys (or Organization Settings for Cloud)
3. Create a new API key
4. Enter your SigNoz URL and the API key below

credentialFields.label: SigNoz URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your SigNoz instance URL (e.g. https://yourcompany.signoz.cloud or self-hosted URL). No trailing slash.

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in SigNoz → Settings → API Keys. Create a key with read permissions.

checks.name: SigNoz Monitoring
checks.description: Verifies monitoring alerts are configured in SigNoz.
